accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items in reading and history.

accommodations.text: Give advance warning before transitions and changes in routine.
accommodations.source_quote: advance warning before transitions and changes in routine

accommodations.text: Allow a four-function calculator on non-calculation-skill tasks.
Provide a copy of teacher notes.

accommodations.text: Provide 50% extended time on reading-heavy assessments.

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy 30 minutes twice weekly
Speech and language therapy social communication 30 minutes weekly

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: independently begin a classroom task within two minutes

goals.text: Ethan will arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days.
goals.baseline: Arrives with required materials in 3 of 10 class days.
goals.source_quote: arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days

goals.text: Noah will use a self-monitoring checklist to review work before submitting in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Reviews work before submitting in 1 of 5 samples.
